post.description: Sends a human approval signal to the document's workflow. When rejecting, rejectionReason is required.

info.title: Document Intelligence Platform API
info.description: Comprehensive REST API for document processing, OCR, workflow orchestration, model training, and human-in-the-loop review

approved.description: Whether the document is approved (true) or rejected (false)

rejectionReason.description: Required when approved is false. Reason for rejecting the document.

userId.description: ID of the user who owns the workflow

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for the workflow config

labelingDocumentId.description: Labeling document ID to add to project

polygon.description: Polygon points as array of numbers [x1,y1,x2,y2,...]

span.description: Span information from OCR for ordering

field_key.description: Field key this label belongs to

replaceAll.description: Whether to replace all existing labels
